privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two NextGen Connect channels: 'SIU Intake Channel' and 'ADT Pre-Registration Processor'. The SIU channel must listen on port 6666, and the ADT channel must insert data into the 'scheduling_preregistrations' table. The HL7 data used in this environment is synthetically generated sample data. The associated occupation is Clinical Systems Integration Engineer matching SOC code 15-1299.09.
